_doc: Maps documented rules to the CI patterns that enforce them. 'ci_pattern' is a regex matched against ci_files content. A missing match fails guard.yml on every push. Add entries here when promoting a rule from T4 (docs) to T1 (CI gate).

rules.description: New build tool deps must be verified present in CI in the same commit as the build script change.
Version strings must be verified in sync across plist, git tag, QL, MCP, npm in CI.
Private config files (.claude/, hooks/, scripts/claude-*) must not be committed to the public repo.
Gatekeeper must accept the release zip (spctl --assess) BEFORE GitHub Release is published, not after.
Notarization staple ticket must be verified present before the release zip is published.
Release zip must contain MarkView.app/ at root — not a nested runner absolute path.
Tag pushes must be blocked by pre-push hook unless release-preflight.sh sentinel is present.
Strategy/competitive/personal docs must not be committed to the public markview repo.
npm postinstall must be smoke-tested after publish — broken binary download is invisible otherwise.
Homebrew tap version + SHA256 must be verified correct after the cask push.
The rule-gate checker itself must be wired into a CI job. Self-referential: if this entry fails, the checker is unwired.
